title: IPrisac PVP
body:
this texture pack is made for PVP in 1.8.9.

it makes swords shorter like this:
![Diamond Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a5332199752c59ac275b6ca43778f2389da772d.png)

this texture pack is made for bedwars, but it works in pvp in general.

optifine is not required for this texture pack.

this texture pack is made by IPrisac
